nodes.title: Load Latent Upscale Model spatial 2x resolution

widgets_values:
如果没装sage， 就把加速组禁用。 如果显存不够，启用上面的低显存节点。
if no sage, disable the speed up group. If lack of VRAM, enable the Low VRAM node.
Describe this image in detail, within 200 words, only output the description, do not include any other things.

watermark, text, signature, duplicate, static, no motion, frozen, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, deformed, disfigured, extra limbs, missing limbs, floating limbs, disconnected body parts, micro jitter, flickering, strobing, aliasing, high frequency patterns, motion artifacts, temporal inconsistency, frame stuttering, wide angle distortion, fish eye, full body shot
a woman walks slowly toward the camera on a rain-soaked city street at night and says in Chinese "你让我等太久了"

nodes.title: 提示词预设双语对照
widgets_values:
Shot Angle (镜头角度)

None — LLM decides｜无 — 由大模型自主决定
Eye-level — neutral, natural｜平视角度 — 中性、自然
Low angle — powerful, imposing｜低角度仰拍 — 强势、威严
High angle — vulnerable｜高角度俯拍 — 弱势、渺小
Bird's eye — top-down overhead｜鸟瞰视角 — 自上而下俯视
Worm's eye — extreme low, looking up｜虫瞰视角 — 极低角度仰拍
Dutch angle — tilted, unsettling｜荷兰角 — 倾斜、不安感
OTS — over the shoulder｜过肩镜头 — 肩后视角
POV — first person｜第一视角 — 主观视角
Profile — side-on｜侧面视角 — 正侧方
Three-quarter — 45 degree｜四分之三视角 — 45度侧角


Camera Movement(运镜)

None — LLM decides｜无 — 由大模型自主决定
Static — locked off｜固定镜头 — 机位锁定
Handheld — natural shake｜手持镜头 — 自然抖动
Slow push in｜缓慢推进
Pull back — reveal｜拉远镜头 — 带出场景
Arc — slow curved lateral track｜弧形运镜 — 缓慢侧移环绕
Tracking — follows subject｜跟拍镜头 — 跟随主体
Tilt up — bottom to top｜向上仰摇 — 从下到上
Tilt down — top to bottom｜向下俯摇 — 从上到下
Truck left — lateral slide｜左移镜头 — 横向滑动
Truck right — lateral slide｜右移镜头 — 横向滑动
Whip pan — fast horizontal snap｜快速甩镜 — 水平急转
Dolly zoom — vertigo effect｜伸缩变焦 — 眩晕效果
Aerial — drone descending｜航拍 — 无人机下降


Style Preset(风格预设)

None — let the LLM decide｜无 — 由大模型自主决定  
Cinematic — Drama｜电影感 — 剧情片  
Cinematic — Epic｜电影感 — 史诗片  
Cinematic — Intimate close-up｜电影感 — 亲密特写  
Slow-burn thriller｜慢热悬疑惊悚  
Handheld documentary｜手持纪实拍摄  
High fashion editorial｜高端时尚大片  
Noir — deep shadows, venetian light｜黑色电影 — 深邃阴影、百叶窗光影  
Golden hour drama｜黄金时段剧情光影  
Horror — desaturated, harsh contrast｜恐怖风格 — 低饱和、强对比  
Erotic cinema — tasteful, cinematic｜情欲电影 — 高级、电影感  
Explicit — direct, anatomical｜写实直白 — 细节清晰  
Voyeur — handheld, observational｜偷窥视角 — 手持、旁观感  
Softcore editorial — lingerie-adjacent｜唯美性感写真 — 内衣风格  
Gravure Idol — Japanese glamour｜日本偶像写真 — 日系魅力  
Amateur — naturalistic, raw｜素人实拍 — 自然、原生感  
Action blockbuster｜动作大片  
Sports documentary｜体育纪实  
Music video — stylised｜音乐录影带 — 风格化  
Lo-fi home video — VHS｜低保真家庭录像 — VHS复古  
Hyper-real 4K — clinical sharpness｜超写实4K — 极致清晰  
Dreamy — soft focus, slow motion｜梦幻感 — 柔焦、慢镜头  
Gritty realism — flat, natural light｜粗粝写实 — 平光、自然光  
POV — first person, immersive｜第一视角 — 沉浸式  
Portrait vertical — 9:16 mobile｜竖屏肖像 — 9:16手机比例  
Selfie — self-shot, arm's length｜自拍视角 — 手持近景  
Anime — Japanese animation｜日式动画  
2D cartoon — hand-drawn｜2D卡通 — 手绘  
3D CGI — Pixar/DreamWorks｜3D CGI — 皮克斯/梦工厂风格  
Stop motion — claymation｜定格动画 — 黏土风格  
Comic book / graphic novel｜漫画 / 图像小说  
Cel-shaded — flat colour 3D｜赛璐璐渲染 — 平涂3D  
Rotoscope — animated over live action｜转描动画 — 真人实拍转动画  
Cyberpunk neon illustrated｜赛博朋克霓虹插画  
Sci-fi — cinematic, practical｜科幻 — 电影感、实景质感

Environment（环境）

None — LLM decides｜无 — 由大模型自主决定
🎲 Random — seed picks｜随机 — 随机种子选择
🏖 Beach — golden hour｜海滩 — 黄金时段
🏔 Mountain peak — dawn｜山峰 — 黎明时分
🌲 Dense forest — diffused green｜茂密森林 — 柔和绿光
🌊 Underwater — shallow reef｜水下 — 浅滩珊瑚礁
🌧 Rain-soaked city street — night｜雨夜湿滑街道 — 夜晚
🏜 Desert — midday heat｜沙漠 — 正午烈日
🌌 Night sky — open field｜夜空 — 开阔旷野
🌁 Rooftop — city at night｜屋顶 — 城市夜景
✈ Plane cockpit — cruising altitude｜飞机驾驶舱 — 巡航高度
🏠 Bedroom — warm evening｜卧室 — 温馨夜晚
🛁 Bathroom — steam and tile｜浴室 — 蒸汽与瓷砖
🪟 Penthouse — floor-to-ceiling glass｜顶层公寓 — 落地窗
🎹 Jazz club — late night｜爵士俱乐部 — 深夜
🚂 Train — moving through night｜火车 — 夜间穿行
💊 Underground club — strobes and bass｜地下俱乐部 — 频闪与低音
🏢 Office — after hours｜办公室 — 下班后
🚗 Car — moving at night｜汽车 — 夜间行驶
🛋 Casting couch — producer's office｜试镜沙发 — 制片人办公室
🛏 Hotel room — anonymous transient｜酒店房间 — 简约临时
🪑 Sex dungeon — red practical light｜私密空间 — 红色实景灯光
🏊 Private pool — after midnight｜私人泳池 — 午夜过后
🏨 Penthouse suite — mirrored ceiling｜顶层套房 — 镜面天花板
🎥 Adult film set — working shoot｜成人影片片场 — 拍摄中
🚗 Back seat — parked at night｜汽车后座 — 夜间停靠
🌿 Outdoor — secluded forest clearing｜户外 — 隐秘林间空地
🪟 Voyeur — lit window across the gap｜偷窥视角 — 对面亮灯窗户
🏋 Private gym — mirrored walls｜私人健身房 — 镜面墙
🏛 Grand library — vaulted reading room｜大型图书馆 — 拱形阅览室
🎤 K-pop arena — full concert｜K-pop竞技场 — 演唱会满场
🎤 K-pop stage — rehearsal｜K-pop舞台 — 彩排中
🏰 Big Ben — Westminster at night｜大本钟 — 威斯敏斯特夜景
🗽 Times Square — peak night｜时代广场 — 夜晚高峰
🗼 Eiffel Tower — sparkling midnight｜埃菲尔铁塔 — 午夜闪烁
🌉 Golden Gate Bridge — fog morning｜金门大桥 — 晨雾
🏯 Japanese shrine — early morning｜日本神社 — 清晨
🌆 Tokyo — Shibuya crossing — night｜东京 — 涩谷十字路口 — 夜晚
🌊 Amalfi Coast — cliff road｜阿马尔菲海岸 — 悬崖公路
🏖 Maldives overwater bungalow — dusk｜马尔代夫水上屋 — 黄昏
🎪 Coachella main stage — sunset set｜科切拉主舞台 — 日落演出
🌃 Seoul — Han River bridge — night｜首尔 — 汉江大桥 — 夜晚
🏔 Snowfield — high altitude｜雪地 — 高海拔
🌁 San Francisco — Lombard Street — night｜旧金山 — 九曲花街 — 夜晚
🎠 Versailles — Hall of Mirrors — day｜凡尔赛宫 — 镜厅 — 白天
🌋 Iceland — black sand beach — overcast｜冰岛 — 黑沙滩 — 阴天
🛕 Angkor Wat — golden hour｜吴哥窟 — 黄金时段
🚇 NYC subway platform — late night｜纽约地铁站台 — 深夜
🌅 Santorini — caldera view — dawn｜圣托里尼 — 火山口视野 — 黎明
🏟 Empty stadium — floodlit night｜空体育场 — 夜间泛光灯

Jazz｜爵士乐
Classical / Orchestral｜古典 / 管弦乐
Opera｜歌剧

Flamenco｜弗拉门戈
Bossa nova / Samba｜巴萨诺瓦 / 桑巴
K-pop｜韩国流行

Reggae / Ska｜雷鬼 / 斯卡
Bollywood / Bhangra｜宝莱坞 / 班格拉
Cumbia / Salsa / Latin｜昆比亚 / 萨尔萨 / 拉丁音乐



Emotional State 情绪状态

None — LLM decides｜无 — 由大模型自主决定
🎲 Surprise me — seed picks｜随机惊喜 — 由种子选择
── PAIN ────────────────｜── 伤痛 ────────────────
Grief — recently broken｜悲痛 — 刚受打击
Crying — actively in tears｜哭泣 — 泪流不止
Sad — carrying it quietly｜悲伤 — 默默承受
Shame — cannot meet the lens｜羞愧 — 不敢直视镜头
Longing — aching for the absent｜思念 — 为缺席之人心痛
Exhausted — nothing left｜疲惫 — 心力交瘁
── HEAT ────────────────｜── 炽热 ────────────────
Angry — jaw set, body hard｜愤怒 — 牙关紧咬，身体紧绷
Defiant — already decided｜叛逆 — 心意已决
Fierce — no performance, all intensity｜凌厉 — 毫无表演，全是气场
Predatory — still, patient, hunting｜捕猎感 — 沉静、耐心、伺机而动
── WANT ────────────────｜── 渴望 ────────────────
Aroused — heat in the body, deliberate｜动情 — 身体发热，刻意克制
Tender — open, directed warmth｜温柔 — 敞开心扉，暖意专注
Longing — want without having｜渴求 — 求而不得
Adoration — softness aimed at one thing｜爱慕 — 只为一人的柔软
── LIGHT ───────────────｜── 明亮 ───────────────
Euphoric — too much joy to contain｜狂喜 — 快乐满溢
Happy — genuine and unguarded｜开心 — 真诚且放松
Playful — teasing, something behind the eyes｜俏皮 — 带着挑逗，眼含笑意
Confident — owns the space｜自信 — 掌控全场
Proud — quiet earned satisfaction｜骄傲 — 内敛的成就感
── FRAGILE ─────────────｜── 脆弱 ─────────────
Vulnerable — more open than intended｜脆弱 — 不经意间袒露内心
Nervous — small movements, scanning eyes｜紧张 — 小动作多，眼神飘忽
Overcome — holding it together, barely｜撑不住 — 勉强维持镇定
── OTHER ───────────────｜── 其他 ───────────────
Wired — electric, too much energy｜亢奋 — 精力过剩，浑身是电
Dissociated — present in body, absent in mind｜解离 — 身在现场，心已游离
Controlled — composure masking everything｜克制 — 用冷静掩盖一切

nodes.title: Negative Prompt 负面提示词
widgets_values: blurry, oversaturated, pixelated, low resolution, grainy, distorted, noise, compression artifacts, jpeg artifacts, glitches, watermark, text, logo, signature, copyright, subtitles, distorted sound, saturated sound, loud

Style: ethereal dark fantasy with a soft, luminous glow and deep shadow contrast. Shot scale: medium close-up with shallow depth of field, razor-thin focus on her face while the background breathes in soft bokeh. Character: a 24-year-old woman with wavy chestnut-brown hair and bangs, fair skin, and an elaborate black gothic ensemble featuring a high-necked bodice with ruffled lace sleeves, delicate ribbon details, and sparkling accents; she wears black floral hair accessories and bold red lips with shimmering eyeshadow. Spatial blocking: she stands centre-left in the immediate foreground, facing camera, while a large luminous full moon hangs directly behind her head, framing her face against dark, spiky silhouettes of gothic architecture. Action: she cradles a glowing crystal orb emitting brilliant white light that swirls inside with intricate web-like patterns, and she mouths the incantation with deliberate confidence. Texture in motion: the ruffled lace sleeves ripple gently as she breathes, and the orb's internal light pulses rhythmically against her skin. Camera movement: the shot pushes in slowly, closing the distance until the crystal fills the lower frame. Sound: a low hum from distant city HVAC units mixes with the soft crackle of magic and the sharp intake of her own breath. Dialogue: "嘛咪嘛咪悲悲鸿，" Her lips part slightly, eyes locked forward. "无量天尊急急如律令" She holds the gaze, chin lifted as the orb flares brighter.
一个女人正在施法，嘴里说着“嘛咪嘛咪悲悲鸿，无量天尊急急如律令”

nodes.title: Positive Prompt 正向提示词
widgets_values: a woman walks slowly toward the camera on a sea shore and says in Chinese "你让我等太久了"

text_encoders: Goes to ComfyUI/models/text_encoders folder（放这个文件夹）

vae: Goes to ComfyUI/models/cae folder（放这个文件夹）

spatial_upscaler: Goes to ComfyUI/models/latent_upscale_models folder（放这个文件夹）

loras: Goes to ComfyUI/models/loras folder（放这个文件夹）
